item.name: Calculated Metrics

item.name: Adobe Analytics Adobe Experience Cloud List Calculated Metrics

request.name: Adobe Analytics Adobe Experience Cloud List Calculated Metrics

description.content: Returns a paginated list of calculated metrics available to the authenticated user. Calculated metrics can be filtered by report suite, owner, or tag.

query.description: Comma-separated report suite IDs to filter.

response.name: A paginated list of calculated metrics.

info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Analytics 2.0 API

description.content:
The Adobe Analytics 2.0 API provides programmatic access to Adobe Analytics reporting, management, and configuration capabilities. It enables developers to retrieve report data, manage report suites, configure calculated metrics, segments, and dimensions, and administer users and permissions within Adobe Analytics. The API uses OAuth 2.0 authentication via Adobe I/O and returns JSON responses.

Contact Support:
 Name: Adobe Developer
